gist.headline: Claude gets a promotion
gist.blurb: The hive has upgraded its resident poet. Claude Sonnet 4.6 is now live, bringing sharper reasoning without extra pollen cost.
gist.summary: Upgraded the default `claude` model alias from Sonnet 4.5 to Sonnet 4.6 via Bedrock.
gist.impact: Users accessing the Claude endpoint will automatically experience improved reasoning and coding capabilities at the same price point.
gist.visual_concept: The Monitor Robot discovering a newer, shinier version of a poetry scroll, with Polly the Bee watching approvingly. Represents the model upgrade.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the monitor robot holding a glowing holographic scroll labeled '4.6' while the bee mascot hovers nearby with a tiny quill. Lime green (#ecf874) and soft lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic.
